notes: Feature v3.1: request-calibrated scale-free features, pool-anchored regularity block, and a live-degeneracy feature mask (LIVE_DEGENERATE_FEATURES in features.py) so training cannot rely on signals that are constant in production. Numpy-native inference (model_v2.npz).
private_data_attestation: This miner does not train on validator-only evaluation data. Feature selection excludes columns whose variance collapses on live traffic, measured on unlabeled captured payloads only (no labels exist in captures; no label information can leak).
training_data_statement: Trained exclusively on the public Poker44 training benchmark (api.poker44.net/api/v1/benchmark), all release dates, projected through the validator payload canonicalizer.

verification.implementation_sha256_recipe: sha256 over files sorted by repo-relative POSIX path, updating for each file: utf-8 bytes of the relative path, then the raw file bytes. Files: neurons/miner.py, poker44/detection/features.py, poker44/detection/model.py
verification.repo_commit_note: repo_commit reported in-band equals `git rev-parse HEAD` of the serving checkout of this repository.
